2026-03-09JUS, FAOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of the Agent for Canada at the International Court of Justice, with the rank of Ambassador Extraordinary and PlenipotentiaryAppointment of Rebecca Netley, Legal Adviser and Director General, International Law Bureau, Global Affairs Canada, to be the Agent for Canada at the International Court of Justice, with the rank of Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Agent for Canada at the International Court of Justice, with the rank of Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary
precis: Appointment of Rebecca Netley, Legal Adviser and Director General, International Law Bureau, Global Affairs Canada, to be the Agent for Canada at the International Court of Justice, with the rank of Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary.
